summary: Accepted the R2 metadata fix. Fix commit c2c028858e94a18bfcb2106e17f7d4439320e5c2 changes only the two requested timestamp fields in the writer handoff and task JSON, both now set to 2026-07-10T11:00:18.000Z, matching writer commit 3391fdbc. Prior substantive audit verdict remains valid: the audit content still accurately separates production paths from fixture/test/demo paths and supports the R0 no-op/client-local/runtime-wiring conclusions.

tests_run.result: Target worktree was clean at c2c028858e94a18bfcb2106e17f7d4439320e5c2 before creating this QA R2 artifact.

tests_run.command: git merge-base --is-ancestor 3391fdbc c2c028858e94a18bfcb2106e17f7d4439320e5c2; git merge-base --is-ancestor a669dc62 c2c028858e94a18bfcb2106e17f7d4439320e5c2; git merge-base --is-ancestor c2c028858e94a18bfcb2106e17f7d4439320e5c2 HEAD
tests_run.result: Original writer commit and QA request-changes commit are ancestors of the fix commit; fix commit was current HEAD.
Fix commit contains one added and one removed line in each of the two metadata JSON files.
Diff shows only created_at and review_ready_at changed from 2026-07-10T11:45:00.000Z to 2026-07-10T11:00:18.000Z.
No whitespace errors in the fix commit.

tests_run.command: node -e parse fix changed JSON files from git show c2c028858e94a18bfcb2106e17f7d4439320e5c2
tests_run.result: Parsed the fixed task JSON and writer handoff JSON from the fix commit.
Writer commit time is 2026-07-10T19:00:18+08:00, matching the fixed 2026-07-10T11:00:18.000Z UTC timestamp.
Git show check for the fix commit passed.
No forbidden paths changed in the fix commit.
Current files contain the fixed 11:00:18.000Z values and no 11:45:00.000Z matches.

tests_run.command: node -e assert writer_created_at and task_review_ready_at equal 2026-07-10T11:00:18.000Z

tests_run.result: No R1/RR1 active task files found.

tests_run.command: rg -n 'new Worker|postMessage|onmessage|MessagePort|MessageChannel|SimulationMessageV1|simulation\.(boot|preview-command|submit-command|query|request-save|load-save)' apps/web/src apps/web/index.html apps/web/host-hash-canary.html apps/desktop/src apps/desktop/renderer packages/ui/src packages/client-core/src
tests_run.result: Matches remain limited to the Web host-hash canary worker; normal production Web/Electron/client paths still do not expose a Simulation Worker message port.

tests_run.command: rg -n 'bootSimulationV1|previewCommandV1|submitCommandV1|querySimulationV1|requestSaveV1|loadSaveV1' apps/web/src apps/desktop/src apps/desktop/renderer packages/ui/src packages/client-core/src
tests_run.result: No production Web/Electron/UI/client-core caller for the bottom sim-core runtime APIs found.
Prior substantive evidence still confirms M3-M6 local command status, local M5/M6 session saves, and M7 local scenario/surface handlers.
UTC check returned 2026-07-10T11:23:12.079Z during QA R2 review.

decisions.decision: The requested timestamp correction is complete and scoped to exactly the two requested JSON metadata fields in the fix commit.
No new substantive audit defect was found; the prior audit-content acceptance remains valid after rechecking the key production/runtime evidence.
Route ACCEPT to lead_orchestrator for integration.

risks: The audit remains static evidence and should not be treated as the future R1 runtime integration test suite.
requested_action: Integrate the accepted R0 production/fixture/no-op audit metadata fix and continue the R0 recovery flow.
